mapper.insert:
insert into word_frequency(word, count_num, business_type, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.word}, #{item.countNum}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})

update.foreach: update word_frequency set word = #{item.word}, count_num = #{item.countNum}, business_type = #{item.businessType}, create_time = #{item.createTime}, update_time = #{item.updateTime} where id = #{item.id}
